lines.english: Does what Madam Bellinsky said come true?
lines.chinese: 贝林斯基夫人说的会成真吗？
lines.raw: Does what Madam Bellinsky said come true? | 贝林斯基夫人说的会成真吗？

lines.english: At a village fair, I decided to visit a fortune-teller called Madam Bellinsky.
lines.chinese: 在一个乡村集市上，我决定去拜访一位名叫贝林斯基夫人的算命师。
lines.raw: At a village fair, I decided to visit a fortune-teller called Madam Bellinsky. | 在一个乡村集市上，我决定去拜访一位名叫贝林斯基夫人的算命师。

lines.english: I went into her tent and she told me to sit down.
lines.chinese: 我走进她的帐篷，她叫我坐下。
lines.raw: I went into her tent and she told me to sit down. | 我走进她的帐篷，她叫我坐下。

lines.english: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball and said:
lines.chinese: 我给了她一些钱后，她看着水晶球说：
lines.raw: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball and said: | 我给了她一些钱后，她看着水晶球说：

lines.english: 'A relation of yours is coming to see you.
lines.raw: 'A relation of yours is coming to see you. | “你的一位亲戚要来看你。

lines.english: She will be arriving this evening and intends to stay for a few days.
lines.chinese: 她今晚会到，打算住几天。
lines.raw: She will be arriving this evening and intends to stay for a few days. | 她今晚会到，打算住几天。

lines.english: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise.
lines.chinese: 你一离开这个帐篷，就会有一个大惊喜。
lines.raw: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise. | 你一离开这个帐篷，就会有一个大惊喜。

lines.english: A woman you know well will rush towards you.
lines.chinese: 一位你很熟悉的女人会向你跑来。
lines.raw: A woman you know well will rush towards you. | 一位你很熟悉的女人会向你跑来。

lines.english: She will speak to you and then she will lead you away from this place. That is all.'
lines.chinese: 她会和你说话，然后带你离开这个地方。就这些了。”
lines.raw: She will speak to you and then she will lead you away from this place. That is all.' | 她会和你说话，然后带你离开这个地方。就这些了。”

lines.english: As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky because my wife hurried towards me.
lines.chinese: 我一出去，就完全把贝林斯基夫人忘在脑后了，因为我妻子匆匆向我走来。
lines.raw: As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky because my wife hurried towards me. | 我一出去，就完全把贝林斯基夫人忘在脑后了，因为我妻子匆匆向我走来。

lines.english: 'Where have you been hiding?' she asked impatiently.
lines.chinese: “你躲到哪里去了？”她不耐烦地问。
lines.raw: 'Where have you been hiding?' she asked impatiently. | “你躲到哪里去了？”她不耐烦地问。

lines.english: 'Your sister will be here in less than an hour and we must be at the station to meet her. We are late already.'
lines.chinese: “你妹妹不到一小时就要到了，我们必须去车站接她。我们已经迟到了。”
lines.raw: 'Your sister will be here in less than an hour and we must be at the station to meet her. We are late already.' | “你妹妹不到一小时就要到了，我们必须去车站接她。我们已经迟到了。”

lines.english: As she walked away, I followed her out of the fair.
lines.chinese: 她走开时，我跟着她离开了集市。
lines.raw: As she walked away, I followed her out of the fair. | 她走开时，我跟着她离开了集市。
